---
title: "City of Salem, Oregon Waste Collection Rate Review"
subtitle: "2003-2025"
number: 35
image: /images/salem_OR.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Salem, Oregon"
categories: ["Rate Setting"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
Mr. Bell has assisted the City of Salem with the review of collection rates in
2003 and 2006 through 2009. Collection services are provided by six franchised
collection companies that provide residential, commercial, and drop box
service to the City's 35,000 residential and 2,500 commercial customers. In
2003, Mr. Bell established a uniform report using input of the six franchised
collection companies and City staff. The standardized format of the report was
necessary to gather the information needed to compare the results of the City's
six hauling companies. Once the companies completed and submitted the report,
Mr. Bell completed a site audit for each hauler to ensure the accuracy of all
reports.

[By M.O. Stevens - Own work, CC BY-SA 3.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=4236863)
:::
